title: Build medication summary export
objective: Create a structured export from a local source file for downstream review.
background: A source document has been gathered and needs a repeatable processing task with clear outputs.

inputs.name: source_html
inputs.description: Primary HTML file to inspect and process.

constraints: Do not overwrite approved outputs without confirmation.
Keep changes within the local project workspace.
Record assumptions where source data is incomplete.
evaluation: Outputs are complete, traceable, and easy to review.
Referenced files and assumptions are clearly listed.
Any gaps or risks are called out plainly.
dependencies: Relevant source files available in source_html/
notes: Replace placeholder values before moving the task to in_progress.
